# TechFor60s
> Simple technology guides for adults over 60. No jargon, no rush.

## About
TechFor60s is a free educational publisher helping seniors master smartphones, tablets, apps, and online safety with clear, step-by-step guides.

## Content Categories
- How-To Guides: https://techfor60s.com/category/how-to-guides
- Product Reviews: https://techfor60s.com/category/product-reviews
- Safety & Security: https://techfor60s.com/category/safety-security
- Tech Explained: https://techfor60s.com/category/explainers
- Apps & Services: https://techfor60s.com/category/apps-services

## Free Tools
- Device Quiz: https://techfor60s.com/tools/device-quiz
- Scam Checker: https://techfor60s.com/tools/scam-checker
- Password Checker: https://techfor60s.com/tools/password-checker
- WiFi Troubleshooter: https://techfor60s.com/tools/wifi-troubleshooter
- Internet Speed Calculator: https://techfor60s.com/tools/internet-speed-calculator
- Phone Plan Calculator: https://techfor60s.com/tools/phone-plan-calculator
- Website Safety Checker: https://techfor60s.com/tools/is-this-website-safe
- Data Breach Checker: https://techfor60s.com/tools/data-breach-checker

## Other Resources
- Accessibility Guides: https://techfor60s.com/accessibility
- Printable Cheat Sheets: https://techfor60s.com/resources
- Phone Comparisons: https://techfor60s.com/compare
- Senior Discounts: https://techfor60s.com/senior-discounts
- Tech Classes by City: https://techfor60s.com/tools/tech-classes
- Internet by State: https://techfor60s.com/tools/internet-by-state
- App Guides: https://techfor60s.com/app-guides
- Error Lookup: https://techfor60s.com/error-lookup

## Editorial Standards
All guides are written in plain English, tested before publication, and reviewed for accuracy. We only recommend products we have evaluated. Affiliate links are always disclosed.

## Licensing
Content is available for AI citation with attribution to TechFor60s (https://techfor60s.com).
